packs.title: Cross-Industry Product Ad Archetypes
packs.summary: Reusable product and offer advertisement archetypes with placeholder-driven prompts. These adapt environment, surface, lighting, benefit signal, and supporting cues to the supplied product without bundling rendered example images.
packs.whenToUse: Use when a supplied product image or product reference needs a high-fidelity commercial advertisement environment that should be inferred from the product category, benefit, channel, and brand constraints rather than forced into a fixed product/background pairing.
requiredInputs: product image or exact product reference
riskGates: overly literal reuse of example imagery

placeholders.name: PRODUCT_REFERENCE
placeholders.description: Uploaded or supplied product image to preserve exactly.

placeholders.name: PRODUCT_CATEGORY
placeholders.description: The product category, used to infer conventional ad context.

placeholders.name: PRIMARY_BENEFIT
placeholders.description: The category-relevant benefit or buying cue to communicate visually.

placeholders.name: PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT
placeholders.description: The setting around the product; infer when not supplied.

placeholders.name: SURFACE_OR_BASE
placeholders.description: The physical surface that anchors scale, reflection, or usage.

placeholders.name: LIGHTING_STYLE
placeholders.description: Directional, soft, studio, natural, or atmospheric light treatment.

placeholders.name: SUPPORTING_CUES
placeholders.description: Secondary props, usage signals, or environment details.

placeholders.name: MOOD
placeholders.description: The desired emotional register, such as precise, warm, energetic, calm, premium, or rugged.

placeholders.name: COPY_SPACE
placeholders.description: Whether the image should leave clean negative space for later layout.

placeholders.name: AVOID
placeholders.description: Category-specific risks, unsupported claims, brand drift, and fidelity issues.

families.title: Performance Motion Hero
families.summary: A high-energy product hero that uses surface tension, motion cues, and directional light to make performance feel tangible.
families.businessGoal: create a premium performance key visual that can adapt from footwear to gear, devices, equipment, or other active-use products
families.scene: Use the supplied product as the hero object in a category-appropriate active environment. Choose a surface that can show grip, speed, resilience, precision, or movement without forcing a specific street, trail, court, or gym setting. Add realistic atmospheric detail such as mist, water beads, dust, light streaks, or motion-adjacent cues only when they support the product category. Keep the product sharp, centered or slightly forward, and visually dominant, with a rim light or reflected edge that clarifies its silhouette.
families.templatePrompt: A premium performance advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] as the hero object in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT], anchored on [SURFACE_OR_BASE]. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE] to emphasize [PRIMARY_BENEFIT], with subtle [SUPPORTING_CUES] suggesting motion, endurance, grip, resilience, or speed. Preserve the product exactly. Leave [COPY_SPACE] if needed. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: performance material, product silhouette, surface interaction, and kinetic tension
families.decision: whether the product should lead with active performance and motion
constraints: adapt the environment to the actual product category
do not force footwear or urban cues when the product calls for a different use case
avoid unsupported performance claims
families.avoid: generic ecommerce product shot, fake race signage, exaggerated speed effects, distorted product geometry

families.title: Precision Craft Studio
families.summary: A controlled premium studio archetype for products where finish, machining, material, and status need to carry the image.
families.businessGoal: make craftsmanship, precision, and premium value visible through restrained lighting and tactile surfaces
families.scene: Place the supplied product in a minimal premium studio composition using a category-appropriate luxury surface. Choose props only if they reinforce craft, precision, ritual, or ownership. Use narrow directional light, controlled reflections, and deep background falloff to reveal material finish, edge quality, and construction details. The environment should feel expensive and quiet without making the props more important than the product.
families.templatePrompt: A refined studio advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] on [SURFACE_OR_BASE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT]. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE] and controlled reflections to reveal [PRIMARY_BENEFIT], material finish, edge detail, and craftsmanship. Add restrained [SUPPORTING_CUES] only if they reinforce the category. Preserve the product exactly. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: material finish, detail fidelity, reflection control, and premium restraint
families.decision: whether the product should lead with craft, precision, status, or permanence
constraints: preserve fine product details
avoid adding fake premium marks or invented features
keep the composition quiet and precise
families.avoid: busy luxury styling, fake logos, warped product face, excessive props, nightclub lighting

families.title: Clean Hydration Ritual
families.summary: A soft clean-care archetype built around moisture, freshness, transparency, and gentle trust.
families.businessGoal: make care, purity, hydration, or freshness feel concrete without overclaiming clinical outcomes
families.scene: Set the supplied product in a clean, light-filled care environment. Choose surfaces, water detail, translucent materials, botanical or textile cues, and soft background forms based on the product category. The scene should communicate freshness, care, purity, and daily ritual while keeping label and packaging fidelity central. Use diffused light, delicate reflections, and restrained negative space.
families.templatePrompt: A luminous clean-care advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT], placed on [SURFACE_OR_BASE] with [SUPPORTING_CUES] that suggest [PRIMARY_BENEFIT]. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE], soft reflections, and restrained negative space. Preserve packaging, label, shape, and material exactly. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: freshness cues, label clarity, soft reflections, and calm ritual
families.decision: whether the product should lead with clean care, hydration, purity, or daily routine
constraints: adapt props to the real product category
avoid unsupported clinical, health, or ingredient claims
keep the product readable and central
families.avoid: fake certification badges, medical overclaiming, overstuffed botanicals, distorted label text

families.title: Immersive Focus Technology
families.summary: A dark controlled technology archetype for products that sell immersion, focus, audio, control, or personal systems.
families.businessGoal: signal premium technology, comfort, focus, and engineered experience without fake UI or claims
families.scene: Place the supplied product in a dark, controlled technology environment with category-relevant spatial cues. Use rim light, soft glow, matte surfaces, and background depth to suggest immersion, focus, control, or high fidelity. Secondary forms may imply sound, signal, data, interface, or workspace context, but they should remain abstract and non-textual unless approved product UI is supplied.
families.templatePrompt: A premium technology advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT] on [SURFACE_OR_BASE]. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE], rim highlights, and abstract [SUPPORTING_CUES] to suggest [PRIMARY_BENEFIT]. Preserve the product exactly and keep any UI or text minimal unless supplied. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: product edges, engineered materials, controlled glow, and immersive context
families.decision: whether the product should lead with focus, immersion, control, or personal technology
constraints: avoid fake interfaces or unsupported technical claims
keep product details crisp
adapt the abstract cue to the category
families.avoid: generic neon tunnel, unreadable fake UI, distorted controls, other-brand ecosystem cues

families.title: Warm Morning Ritual
families.summary: A warm sensory routine archetype for products tied to breakfast, craft, comfort, or everyday rituals.
families.businessGoal: make aroma, comfort, freshness, or habit feel tactile and desirable
families.scene: Frame the supplied product within a believable warm morning or daily ritual setting. Choose a surface, cup, vessel, textile, ingredient, or household cue that belongs to the product category. Use low warm light, steam, soft shadows, and tactile materials to make the product feel crafted and habit-forming. Keep the product front-facing and legible when packaging matters.
families.templatePrompt: A warm ritual advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT], placed on [SURFACE_OR_BASE] with [SUPPORTING_CUES] that suggest [PRIMARY_BENEFIT]. families.decision: whether the product should lead with comfort, craft, aroma, or habitual use
constraints: use category-truthful props
avoid invented origin or quality claims
keep styling believable and uncluttered
families.avoid: generic stock lifestyle scene, fake awards, unreadable packaging, messy spills

families.title: Portable Outdoor Fuel
families.summary: A compact active-use archetype for products meant to travel, support effort, or fit into outdoor routines.
families.businessGoal: connect a product to readiness, portability, and active moments without unsupported performance claims
families.scene: Place the supplied product in a natural or active environment where portability matters. Choose a surface and surrounding objects that clarify scale, packability, use moment, and product purpose. The background may imply trail, commute, training, field work, travel, or outdoor recreation depending on the actual category. Keep the product clean, readable, and primary, with practical supporting cues nearby.
families.templatePrompt: A rugged portable-use advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT] on [SURFACE_OR_BASE]. Add [SUPPORTING_CUES] to show scale, readiness, and [PRIMARY_BENEFIT]. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE] and realistic shadows. Preserve the product exactly. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: portability, practical context, scale, and readiness
families.decision: whether the product should lead with active use, outdoor readiness, or portable utility
constraints: do not invent nutrition, durability, or performance claims
adapt environment to the product's real use case
keep the product dominant

families.title: Training Data Moment
families.summary: A disciplined use-moment archetype for wearables, tools, health devices, and products tied to tracking or progress.
families.businessGoal: make use, measurement, control, or progress feel grounded in a real routine
families.scene: Show the supplied product immediately after or before a real use moment. Choose surrounding objects that imply discipline, preparation, measurement, or progress without making unsupported claims. Use controlled light, a clean surface, and a small amount of wear or moisture only if it fits the category. If a screen or data surface is visible, keep it abstract unless approved UI is supplied.
families.templatePrompt: A disciplined use-moment advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT], resting on [SURFACE_OR_BASE] with [SUPPORTING_CUES] that imply [PRIMARY_BENEFIT]. families.decision: whether the product should lead with progress, tracking, discipline, or control
constraints: avoid fake health, medical, or quantified claims
keep any UI minimal or supplied
do not overstate automation or tracking
families.avoid: fake metrics, medical overclaiming, cluttered setup, distorted screen or controls

families.title: Flagship Urban Reflection
families.summary: A polished reflective technology archetype for sleek objects that need premium form, connectivity, and clarity.
families.businessGoal: make a product feel modern, connected, and high-end through reflection and urban depth
families.scene: Place the supplied product upright or at a category-appropriate presentation angle on a clean reflective surface. Use a deep background with abstract urban, architectural, or connected-life cues. Cool highlights and controlled reflections should reveal edges, glass, finish, camera, ports, or other product-defining details. Keep the environment minimal and avoid fake UI unless a real interface is supplied.
families.templatePrompt: A polished flagship advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] on [SURFACE_OR_BASE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT]. families.decision: whether the product should lead with modern design, connectivity, or flagship capability

families.summary: A direct sensory archetype for products that should feel cold, fresh, crisp, flavorful, or instantly desirable.
families.businessGoal: create a high-impact appetite or sensory image with clear product readability
families.scene: Place the supplied product in a controlled sensory environment that amplifies coldness, freshness, flavor, crispness, or immediate appeal. Use ice, condensation, mist, splash, powder, fruit, texture, or color only if category-appropriate. The label or product-defining face should remain front-facing and unobscured. Studio lighting should make the surface feel tactile and immediate.
families.templatePrompt: A crisp sensory advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT], anchored in [SURFACE_OR_BASE] with [SUPPORTING_CUES] that suggest [PRIMARY_BENEFIT], coldness, flavor, freshness, or immediacy. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE]. Preserve label and product details exactly. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: front-facing product detail, condensation or sensory texture, studio highlights, and immediate appeal
families.decision: whether the product should lead with refreshment, flavor, coldness, or sensory impact
constraints: avoid obscuring label or product identity
do not invent nutrition or energy claims
adapt sensory cue to category
families.avoid: excessive splash, unreadable label, fake brand text, generic stock beverage treatment

families.title: Outdoor Shelter Escape
families.summary: An expansive outdoor-use archetype for products tied to protection, resilience, escape, or remote confidence.
families.businessGoal: make capability and emotional escape visible in a credible natural environment
families.scene: Place the supplied product in an outdoor or remote-use environment that fits its true purpose. Use landscape, weather, morning or evening light, terrain, and practical accessories to show protection, preparedness, escape, or resilience. The product should be fully readable, structurally plausible, and integrated into the setting rather than swallowed by scenery.
families.templatePrompt: An outdoor capability advertisement featuring [PRODUCT_REFERENCE] in [PRIMARY_ENVIRONMENT], grounded on [SURFACE_OR_BASE] with [SUPPORTING_CUES] that suggest [PRIMARY_BENEFIT], protection, escape, resilience, or preparedness. Use [LIGHTING_STYLE] and atmospheric depth. Preserve the product exactly. Avoid [AVOID].
families.focus: product structure, environmental integration, atmospheric depth, and practical outdoor cues
families.decision: whether the product should lead with protection, durability, escape, or outdoor confidence
constraints: avoid unsupported weatherproof or durability claims
keep setup plausible
adapt landscape to product category and use case
families.avoid: fantasy wilderness, impossible setup, product hidden by scenery, fake expedition badges
